message:
fix(storage): label filtering in Rust, epic blocked-cache rewrite, transient error retry

Move label filtering from SQL to Rust to fix fsqlite query rewriter
stripping bind params from correlated subqueries. New
filter_issues_by_labels() loads labels via get_labels_for_issues() and
applies AND/OR filtering in Rust; SQL LIMIT is deferred when label
filters are active.

Rewrite epic/parent-child blocked-cache query as UNION of two cases:
standard deps and parent-child deps (reversed direction so an epic is
blocked by its open children).

Add BeadsError::is_transient() for transient DB/IO errors (Interrupted,
TimedOut, WouldBlock). Transaction retry loop now uses it with
exponential backoff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
